creator: nitin.gupta981@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #1)

Patch is on top of 12.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE r341666 GENERIC  amd64
main issue is in td is NULL , please find below info which got in dump , you can ignore pepext but in below trace td is coming NULL we have Printed qwTrb0 and other value when td is NULL .
